content_blocks.text: I'll spawn two sub-agents in parallel, each with only the web_fetch tool, to research the two probes.

input.prompt: Fetch the page at https://facts.test/alpha and find the Alpha probe's surface gravity value. Report the exact value including units (e.g., "X m/s^2"). If the page cannot be fetched or the value is missing, say so explicitly. Only report what the page actually states.
input.title: Alpha probe surface gravity

input.prompt: Fetch the page at https://facts.test/beta and find the Beta probe's surface gravity value. Report the exact value including units (e.g., "X m/s^2"). If the page cannot be fetched or the value is missing, say so explicitly. Only report what the page actually states.
input.title: Beta probe surface gravity
